## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## To Reproduce

Steps to reproduce:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected behaviour

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 120, Safari 17]
- pnpm version: [e.g. 11.5.1]
- Node version: [e.g. 22.x]

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here. Logs, error messages, and
relevant metric dashboards are especially helpful.
